fields.listenDesc: Listen address, 0.0.0.0 means listen on all interfaces
fields.tagDesc: Inbound tag for routing rules. Auto-generated from protocol-transport-security-port
fields.sniffingDesc: Automatically detect and override destination address
fields.hostCustomDesc: Custom Host header, leave empty for default
fields.keyFilePathDesc: Absolute path to private key file
fields.destDesc: Target website supporting TLS 1.3 and H2
fields.serverNamesDesc: Server names in target website certificate, comma separated
fields.privateKeyDesc: Private key generated by xray x25519 command
fields.shortIdsDesc: Short ID list, comma separated, empty means client can be empty
fields.serverPasswordDesc: Password will be Base64 encoded automatically
fields.decryptionDesc: VLESS decryption mode, supports post-quantum encryption
fields.obfsDesc: Optional traffic obfuscation, requires obfuscation password when enabled
fields.allowTransparentDesc: When true, forwards all HTTP requests, not just proxy requests
fields.forwardAddressDesc: Target address to forward to (domain or IP)
fields.followRedirectDesc: When true, tunnel will recognize data forwarded by iptables
fields.userLevelAllDesc: User level, all connections use this level
fields.domainStrategyDesc: Use AsIs to pass domain to sockopt module for processing
fields.uuidDesc: User UUID, generate using xray uuid command
fields.userPasswordDesc_psk: Password will be Base64 encoded automatically

composer.selectProtocolPrompt: Select a protocol and fill in the configuration based on the template
composer.needsNginx: Requires additional Nginx reverse proxy configuration.
composer.needsCaddy: Requires additional Caddy configuration for inbound.
composer.settingsDesc: Fill or modify core protocol fields based on the example.
composer.streamSettingsDesc: Adjust transport layer configuration as needed, such as TLS certificates, paths, or transport parameters.
composer.sniffingSettingsDesc: Optional configuration, clear if sniffing is not needed.
defaultHints: Adjust settings and streamSettings content based on example templates.
Real-time preview on the right shows the complete JSON configuration.
vlessHints: clients: Configure user list, id is UUID.
decryption is usually kept as none.
fallbacks are optional, used for falling back to other services.
vmessHints: clients: User list, contains id, level, email and other fields.
Default template includes default node, adjust as needed.
trojanHints: clients: Configure password and user info.
shadowsocksHints: For multiple users, add to clients.
shadowsocks2022Hints: key field is Base64 encoded key.
keys in clients must match client side.
socksHints: auth can be noauth or password.
accounts field is used when password auth is enabled.
httpHints: allowTransparent controls whether transparent proxy is allowed.
tunnelHints: address and port point to target service.
network field determines the proxy network type.

inbounds.title: Xray Inbound Management
inbounds.selectServerFirst: Please select a remote server first
inbounds.noInboundsDesc: Click "Add Inbound" button to add inbound configuration
inbounds.addInboundWizardDesc: Based on Xray official example configs, quickly generate inbound configuration via wizard
inbounds.addInboundWizardDescShort: Quickly generate inbound configuration via wizard
inbounds.confirmDeleteDesc: Are you sure you want to delete inbound "{{tag}}"? This action cannot be undone.

outbounds.title: Xray Outbound Management
outbounds.selectServerFirst: Please select a remote server first
outbounds.noOutboundsDesc: Click button above to add outbound configuration
outbounds.addOutboundWizardDesc: Based on Xray official example configs, quickly generate outbound configuration via wizard
outbounds.addOutboundWizardDescShort: Quickly generate outbound configuration via wizard
outbounds.confirmDeletePrompt: Are you sure you want to delete outbound "{{tag}}"?
outbounds.domainStrategyWhenTarget: When target address is a domain, configure Xray behavior for connecting to remote server
outbounds.asIsDesc: No special domain handling, uses Go's built-in Dial, priority fixed to RFC6724 defaults (usually IPv6 first)
outbounds.useIpDesc: Uses built-in DNS to resolve domains. Falls back to AsIs when resolution doesn't meet requirements.
outbounds.forceIpDesc: Forces built-in DNS to resolve domains. Connection fails when resolution doesn't meet requirements.
outbounds.useIpFallbackDesc: Falls back to AsIs on resolution failure

wizard.selectTargetServerDesc: Select server to add inbound (single selection)
wizard.nodeNameDesc: Custom node display name, flag auto-selected based on server IP
wizard.realityDomainAllFailed: All domain probes failed, please enter manually
wizard.simpleModeDesc: Current protocol requires no user configuration, submit with default parameters
wizard.commonConfigDesc: Basic configuration applicable to all inbounds
wizard.stealSelfDesc: Read all server configured domains and probe latency from current server
wizard.sslConfigDesc: The following servers' port 443 is unavailable, SSL certificate and Nginx port 443 configuration required
wizard.selectTemplate: Please select a complete template first
wizard.selectAtLeastOneServer: Please select at least one server
wizard.validPort: Please enter a valid port number (1-65535)
wizard.portOccupied: Port {{port}} is already occupied by another inbound, please change the port
wizard.needsCertSwitch: This security protocol requires certificate files, please switch to expert mode
wizard.selectAtLeastOneUser: Please select at least one user
wizard.autoGenRealityFailed: Auto-generating REALITY key pair failed, please click generate button manually
wizard.autoGenRealityKeyFailed: Auto-generating REALITY private key failed, please switch to expert mode

nodeSelect.importDesc: Select a node to import its configuration to outbound
nodeSelect.searchPlaceholder: Search by node name, protocol or tag

userSelect.title: Select Users
userSelect.desc: Select users to add from the user list
userSelect.updateEmailFailed: Failed to update email for user {{username}}

arrayField.empty: No {{label}} yet, click button above to add

keyGenerator.keyGenSuccessDescBoth: Private key and public key auto-filled
keyGenerator.keyGenFailedDesc: Unable to generate key, please ensure Xray is installed on the server

certSelect.noCertsDesc: Please apply for a certificate in Certificate Management first

vlessDecryption.supportPostQuantum: VLESS decryption mode, supports post-quantum encryption
vlessDecryption.nativeDesc: Public key visible in header, identifiable in TLSv1.3 AEAD mode
vlessDecryption.xorpubDesc: XOR obfuscation of public key features
vlessDecryption.paddingDesc: Anti-fingerprint padding config, format: probability-length-interval sequence
vlessDecryption.configValueDescEncrypted: Click generate button to auto-generate post-quantum encryption config
vlessDecryption.genFailedDesc: Unable to generate key, please ensure Xray is installed on the server

routing.noRulesDesc: Click "Quick Add" or "Custom Rule" to add
routing.clickToView: Click a rule on the left to view details
routing.customRuleDesc: Supports all Xray routing fields, empty fields are not submitted
routing.confirmDeleteRuleDesc: Are you sure you want to delete this routing rule?
routing.deleteAutoRestart: Xray will be restarted automatically after deletion.
routing.ruleAdded: Routing rule added and Xray restarted
routing.ruleDeleted: Routing rule deleted and Xray restarted
routing.orderUpdated: Rule order updated and Xray restarted
routing.fillAtLeastOne: Please fill in at least one match condition
routing.localSortNotSupported: Local server sorting not supported yet

servers.title: Service Management
servers.noServersDesc: Click "Add Server" button to add a remote server
servers.addRemoteServerDesc: Add a remote MMWX server for management. Enter name to generate Token, then execute the install command on the remote server.
servers.stealSelfDesc: After enabling "Steal Self", Xray + Nginx will be auto-installed after mmw-agent installation
servers.tunnelModeDesc: Xray listens on port 443, forwards to Nginx via tunnel
servers.fallbackModeDesc: Xray listens on port 443, falls back to Nginx
servers.domainAutoFilled: Master domain auto-filled (server IP matches master)
servers.domainDesc: After Agent connects, Nginx + Xray port 443 config and certificates will be auto-deployed. Recommended to add one steal-self server per region.
servers.tokenDesc: Master Token for Agent to authenticate with master server; Child Token for master to pull data from Agent. Master will auto-switch to pull mode when Agent cannot report actively.
servers.xrayManagementDesc: Manage remote server Xray service control, configuration, inbounds, outbounds and routing
servers.confirmDeleteServerDesc: Are you sure you want to delete remote server "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
servers.localServerDetected: Local server detected, Nginx reverse proxy auto-configured
servers.remoteXrayConfigUpdated: Remote server Xray config updated, service restarted
servers.use443NeedsDomain: Domain is required when deploying on port 443
servers.fillComplete: Please fill in all required fields
servers.editRemoteServerDesc: Modify remote server name, domain, traffic limit and other information
servers.timeOffsetWarning: Server time offset detected, may cause issues with time-sensitive protocols like vmess and ss
servers.serverOfflineDesc: Server is offline, please check service status or reinstall.
servers.serverOfflineDescDetailed: Execute the following command on the remote server to complete installation, or manually configure the Token.
servers.offlineReinstallHint: If the service cannot start, try reinstalling.
servers.onlineInstallHint: Execute this command on the remote server to auto-download and configure the MMWX client.
servers.jsonFormatError: Invalid JSON format, please check the config
servers.domainHint: If domain is provided, node server address will use domain instead of IP
servers.stealModeDefaultDesc: No steal-self, Xray listens directly on protocol port
servers.stealModeSwitchWarning: Switching mode will redeploy config, existing inbounds will be preserved
servers.syncToNodesDesc: Sync remote server inbound configurations to node management for subscription link generation.
servers.syncServerHostPlaceholder: Enter the remote server's public address (domain or IP)
servers.syncServerHostHint: Used for node config generation, enter an address accessible by clients.
servers.forceOverrideDesc: Override existing nodes with same name
servers.addWebsiteDesc: Add a new website domain for the remote server
servers.deleteServerTokenWarning: Are you sure you want to delete this remote server? Its Token will be revoked and the remote server will no longer be able to communicate with this server.
servers.xrayModeExternalDesc: Uses a standalone Xray process, Agent communicates via gRPC
servers.xrayModeEmbeddedDesc: Agent embeds Xray-core, supports auto speed limiting and device limiting
servers.xrayModeEmbeddedProHint: Pro supports speed limiting and connection limiting
